$description: Component tokens for Mobile Tag component - a compact label component used for categorization, filtering, and status indication. Supports multiple color variants (primary, neutral, success, error, warning, and accent colors), two styles (outline and filled), and multiple interactive states across 4 sizes (xs, sm, md, lg). Figma Reference: Node ID 393-823

$component.name: Tag
$component.description: A mobile tag component that displays a label with optional close icon. Used for categorization, filtering, status indication, and removable labels. Supports outline and filled styles, multiple color variants, and various interactive states. Features rounded corners, configurable padding, and optional tag count display.
$component.structure: Horizontal container with text label on the left, optional tag count badge, and optional close icon on the right. Supports square and rounded border radius variants.

sizes.xs: Extra small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 18px height
sizes.sm: Small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 22px height
sizes.md: Medium size (commonly used default for mobile) - typically 24px height
sizes.lg: Large size for prominent mobile tags - typically 28px height

variants.outline: Tag style with colored border and light background, suitable for less prominent use cases
variants.filled: Tag style with solid colored background, suitable for prominent status indication
variants.primary: Primary blue color variant for main actions and primary content
variants.neutral: Neutral gray color variant for standard content and secondary information
variants.success: Green color variant for success states and positive feedback
variants.error: Red color variant for error states and destructive actions
variants.warning: Orange/yellow color variant for warning states and cautionary messages

usage.contexts: Mobile filters, category labels, status indicators, removable tags, tag input fields, search filters, content categorization, badge displays
usage.features: Removable close icon, Tag count badge, Multiple color variants, Outline and filled styles, Interactive states (hover, active, focused, disabled), Square and rounded corners

tag.$comment: Tag component tokens - includes border, padding, gap, height, variants, text, and icon tokens

border.$comment: Border tokens for tag component - includes radius variants (square and rounded) and border width

square.$comment: Square border radius variant - minimal rounding for tags
